parents.subject: LU-16565 ldlm: Add ldlm_is,set,clear to spelling

commit.subject: LU-16565 ldlm: 4: Remove ldlm is,set,clear macros
commit.message:
LU-16565 ldlm: 4: Remove ldlm is,set,clear macros

This patch removes some of the ldlm_is,set,clear_ macro
usage and replaces it with direct flag names.

This is patch 4 in a series.

test-parameters: forbuildonly

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
